payload.step:
In a sterile 10mL reservoir, add 2,534 μl of Platinum Hot Start PCR 2X Master Mix and 3,295 µL of PCR Clean Water per set of 384 samples
 2534 µL, 2X PCR Master Mix 3295 µL, PCR Clean Water 
Mix pipette.

epMotion 5075 (Liquid Handling, Eppendorf, 5075000962) 
Follow the diagram below while setting up the epMotion worktable.

[Capture3.PNG]](https://content.protocols.io/8bz3mm6.png) 
Place (1) box of 1-50µL epT.I.P.S. w/filters on deck slot A4
Place empty 384 PCR Primer Plates 1-3 on deck stols B1-B3
Place 10mL reservoir with PCR Master Mix in the first slot of the reservoir rack, then place reservoir rack on deck slot B4.

Remove box lids and execute protocol.

(Protocol must be imported to epBlue software prior to attempting to execute it. _epBlue 40.6 or later_)
 [Application_3XPCR_mastermix aliquot 4ul_384eppendorf_181003_105306.export6](https://content.protocols.io/8b23mm6.export6)

The automated protocol transfers 4.6 µL of PCR Master Mix into (3) 384-well PCR plates using the multidispense feature of the epBlue software.
